concept: I'm Not Yawning, You're Just That Interesting
title: Funny Sarcastic T-Shirt - 'I'm Not Yawning, You're Just That Interesting'
description:
We’ve all been there — trapped in a conversation so boring that even your brain tries to escape through a yawn. Let this t-shirt speak for you! Featuring a hilariously relatable slogan, it’s perfect for those moments when diplomacy is overrated, and sarcasm reigns supreme. Plus, it’s way more socially acceptable than actually yawning in someone’s face. 

Perfect for: 
- Chronic overthinkers tired of small talk 
- The friend who lives for passive-aggressive humor 
- Breaking the ice at awkward gatherings 

DETAILS: 
- Available in dark and light print variants to fit your vibe 
- Clean bold typography design centered on the chest 
- Made-to-order with high-quality inks and a hilarious attitude 

Whether you’re at a family reunion, business meeting, or stuck next to a talker on public transit, this shirt is here to save your sanity — one cheeky slogan at a time.

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
